description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and flock print on the chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned for the denim fan, this T-shirt from locomotive is the perfect buy.
